competitors.name: Online Stopwatch
weaknesses: No persistent URL for saved timers

competitors.name: Time and Date Countdown Timer
weaknesses: Screen not maximized for 'big screen' use

competitors.name: TickCounter
weaknesses: Primary focus is widgets, not a dedicated big-screen page
Big screen view isn't the default or optimized experience

competitors.name: Timer Tab
features: Persistent timer that saves in browser

competitors.name: Big Timer
weaknesses: No customization of colors or themes

gaps.gap: Lack of collaborative, multi-user timer control for meetings/events.
gaps.implementation: Create a timer that generates a unique room URL. Anyone joining can see the timer. Designate 'presenter' controls that can be passed, allowing multiple people in a meeting to control the timer without sharing a mouse/keyboard.

gaps.gap: No integrated visual themes or modes for specific use cases (e.g., Pomodoro with work/break cycles, workout timers with exercise graphics, party timers with fun animations).
gaps.implementation: Build a theme selector with pre-built templates: 'Focus Mode', 'Workout', 'Classroom', 'Celebration', 'Meeting'. Each theme changes colors, fonts, background, and completion graphics/sounds.

gaps.gap: Absence of timer sequences or playlists for complex timing needs.
gaps.implementation: Allow users to create a sequence of multiple timers (e.g., 25-min work, 5-min break, 25-min work, 15-min break). The interface would show the current segment and what's next, auto-advancing upon completion.

gaps.gap: Poor post-completion experience. Most timers just stop or beep.
gaps.implementation: Create a dynamic 'completion screen' with options: large celebratory message, confetti animation, play a selected song/video from YouTube/Spotify link, or automatically launch the next timer in a sequence.

gaps.gap: No premium, ad-free, feature-rich tier for professional use (teachers, trainers, event coordinators).
gaps.implementation: Develop a freemium model. Free: basic timer with ads. Paid ($3-5/month): Remove ads, unlock all themes, enable sequences, collaborative rooms, custom branding/logo on timer, and cloud save of timer setups.

recommended_positioning: The collaborative, themeable big-screen timer for engaging meetings, classes, and events.
